calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Hunter Sims, Esq. appearing for Defendant. Counsel reports in open court that self-represented Plaintiff passed away and plaintiff's family do not wish to pursue the matter. Copy of the death certificate and email correspondence from plaintiff's family stating their wish not to pursue are submitted in open court for Court's review.

Court having heard the oral argument and reviewed the documents, rules that the case is DIMISSED. JUDGE JOHN STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jul-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Hunter W. Sims III, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Motion To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted is granted in its entirety. The matters specified in defendant's Requests for Admission (Set Number One) shall be deemed admitted. Plaintiff Alfred R. Waldron shall pay monetary sanctions to defendant in the sum of $750 within twenty days of the hearing date of this motion. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
